top_tweets.text:
i think i’ve said this before, but the most inspiring design work is happening outside of consumer apps.

and Mixtape’s pause menu is just one great example. https://t.co/TIDZHWINg9
top_tweets.author: adityafinal_psd
top_tweets.name: aditya
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者認為最具啟發性的設計作品正發生在消費性 App 之外，並以 Mixtape 的暫停選單為例，說明遊戲或其他領域的介面創新值得關注。

top_tweets.text:
Coinbase fired 14% of their staff and CEO openly talked about non technical folks writing product code using AI

Just a few days later, their site goes down for hours in a row and customers are unable to access their account or money

You literally cannot make this up
top_tweets.author: BoringBiz_
top_tweets.name: Boring_Business
top_tweets.summary_zh: Coinbase 裁員 14% 且 CEO 公開表示非技術人員可用 AI 寫產品程式碼，幾天後網站就當機數小時、用戶無法存取帳戶，凸顯過度依賴 AI 與裁員的風險。

top_tweets.text: This whole “get the DESIGN.md for any website and make your own website look like a shitty version of someone else’s website” thing is depressing 🥴 some of you actually want that?
top_tweets.author: adamwathan
top_tweets.name: Adam Wathan
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者批評「抓取任何網站的 DESIGN.md 來製作山寨版網站」的風潮令人沮喪，質疑為何有人真的想要這樣的設計捷徑。討論中也有人擔憂 AI 輔助設計可能導致同質化與抄襲問題。

top_tweets.text:
System design interview notes based on bestselling guides

https://t.co/KXyPJ57JJL https://t.co/ikNuCCXn2u
top_tweets.author: tom_doerr
top_tweets.name: Tom Dörr
top_tweets.summary_zh: 整理自暢銷指南的系統設計面試筆記資源，適合 PM 與工程師準備技術面試時參考。

top_tweets.text:
Guerrilla Games co-founder Arjan Brussee, a longtime Epic Games veteran who previously served as global director of product management for Unreal Engine, is developing The Immense Engine.

The new engine is made in the Netherlands as a European choice instead of Unreal Engine or https://t.co/SWzNEcCL3E
top_tweets.author: Pirat_Nation
top_tweets.name: Pirat_Nation 🔴
top_tweets.summary_zh: Guerrilla Games 共同創辦人、前 Epic 資深 PM 正在荷蘭開發新遊戲引擎 The Immense Engine，定位為歐洲市場對 Unreal Engine 的替代選擇。

top_tweets.text: Fight Club movie flash website in 1999 https://t.co/IqU7IelS55
top_tweets.author: WebDesignMuseum
top_tweets.name: Web Design Museum
top_tweets.summary_zh: 1999 年《鬥陣俱樂部》電影的 Flash 官網設計，展示早期網頁互動體驗的創意手法，可作為數位產品演進的參考案例。

top_tweets.text:
These tea cups use thermochromic pigments with molecules that rearrange when heated. As you pour hot water the design transforms from bare branches to blooming cherry blossoms.
https://t.co/UQUWxwOHZS
top_tweets.author: wonderofscience
top_tweets.name: Wonder of Science
top_tweets.summary_zh: 茶杯運用熱致變色顏料，倒入熱水後圖案從光禿枝條轉為盛開櫻花，展示材料科學如何為產品帶來驚喜體驗與情感連結。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: Zappy by ZapDigits
top_products.author: fmerian
top_products.summary_zh: AI 驅動的報表分析工具，協助使用者自動產生與解讀數據報告。

top_products.title: nocal 4
top_products.author: Brian Muse
top_products.tagline: The calendar that thinks like a workspace
top_products.summary_zh: 將日曆介面與工作空間概念結合的排程工具，提供更符合工作流程的時間管理方式。

top_products.title: Staff.rip
top_products.author: Yehdy Hellet
top_products.tagline: Describe a code change in plain language and ship it
top_products.summary_zh: 讓開發者用自然語言描述程式碼變更需求，系統即可自動完成程式修改並部署。

top_products.title: Codex in Chrome
top_products.author: Zac Zuo
top_products.tagline: Let Codex navigate and automate tasks in your browser
top_products.summary_zh: Chrome 擴充功能，透過 Codex 在瀏覽器中自動執行網頁導航與任務操作。

top_products.title: MarkUp
top_products.author: Michael Castelo
top_products.tagline: Edit websites through AI with visual prompts
top_products.summary_zh: 以視覺化提示方式，透過 AI 直接編輯網站內容的工具。

top_products.title: Toto
top_products.author: Alex Funk
top_products.tagline: Context rich tasks sent to the best model.
top_products.summary_zh: 智能任務分配系統，根據任務情境自動選擇最適合的 AI 模型執行。
